programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E29 - Mermaid
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E2 - Summer As The Water Flows
programme.desc: The Trois-Lacs-Jura region and its Lakes Bienne, Morat and Neuchatel; Lake Maggiore, between Switzerland and Italy; Lakes Zurich, Brienz and Thoune in the Bernese Oberland... In summer, water attracts all with an unconditional love of their country's lakes.

programme.desc: In the line-up: Mercosur, farmers raising consumer awareness; a rejuvenated UN summit; flowers for Valentine's Day; immersion with a 4L Trophy crew...

programme.title: E99
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E2 - Summer As The Water Flows
programme.desc: The Trois-Lacs-Jura region and its Lakes Bienne, Morat and Neuchatel; Lake Maggiore, between Switzerland and Italy; Lakes Zurich, Brienz and Thoune in the Bernese Oberland... In summer, water attracts all with an unconditional love of their country's lakes.

programme.title: E7 - Mercosur/Un/Valentine's Day/4L Trophy
programme.desc: In the line-up: Mercosur, farmers raising consumer awareness; a rejuvenated UN summit; flowers for Valentine's Day; immersion with a 4L Trophy crew...

programme.title: E4 - Of Wild Waves And Ocean Spray
programme.desc: Pauline Horellou, in Pays Bigouden, and Gaelle de Trescadec, in Cap Sizun, bring time to a standstill as they paint the portrait of the most dramatic waves. They are part of a new community of storm chasers, sharing their photos and enjoying a notable success on social media.

programme.title: E12 - Muffin Mixes
programme.desc: Are there interesting choices regarding prices and nutritional values among store-bought muffin mixes? Also: hot chocolate taste test, potato masher test, blood sausage, less and less disliked.

programme.title: E99
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E2 - Fontaine-L'eveque
programme.desc: New stop: heading to the province of Hainaut, between Charleroi and Binche, to Fontaine-l'Eveque, which also includes the former municipalities of: Leernes, Chateau Bivort and Forchies-la-Marche. Featuring visits to Chateau Bivort, the Gasometer Museum and the Petria slag heap, a Natura 2000 area.

programme.title: E4 - Classic Chocolate Cake
programme.desc: Isabelle tackles a great classic that brings joy on any occasion: chocolate cake.

programme.title: E236 - The Monsters In Your Head/Bounty Ball/Fear The Fogg/Super-Villain Team-Up/De-Fanged
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen learn a rumor of an alien invasion happening at the park they are camping at, but when they investigate, they discover a preserve containing a host of mutated creatures engineered by Animo!

programme.title: E401 - Everyone Needs Friends/Doc Mob/Library
programme.desc: Lamput befriends a lonely sea monster and attempts to help it to make new friends with the locals.

programme.title: E105 - The Code/The Test/The Loophole/The Fuss/The News
programme.desc: Gumball learns that the Wattersons have been stealing Mr Robinson's wi-fi for years. When it goes down they try and live without it, but life offline proves too hard, Gumball and Darwin decide to hack their way through cyberspace to learn Mr Robinson's passcode.

programme.title: E78 - Log Date 7-15-2/Steven's Birthday
programme.desc: Steven sneaks a listen to a friend's audio diary.

programme.title: E84 - The Love/The Scam/The Awkwardness/The Nest/The Points
programme.desc: When Bobert finds he's infected with a virus called love.exe he asks Gumball and Darwin to give him a definition for the word 'love'. When they try to explain it through song, it gets him no closer to an answer, so he asks the other residents of Elmore to give their versions of what love means to them.

programme.title: E303 - The Spectral Lands
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band - to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam: the Journey's End
programme.desc: The Mekong Delta is one of the largest on Earth. Formed over the last 8000 years, it fans out and discharges into the South China Sea via nine channels. These channels split and shape the coastline, creating unique habitats for a variety of animals.

programme.title: E2 - Life in Dark Water
programme.desc: Learn how winter’s arrival triggers animal survival instincts in southwestern New Zealand. Track dolphins as they move to warmer waters to give their calves a fighting chance, and join longfin eels on an epic migration to their spawning grounds.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E3 - Christmas Island
programme.desc: Christmas Island, over a thousand kilometres northwest of Australia’s mainland, is a speck of an island that rises out of the Indian Ocean, a tiny refuge to plants and creatures found nowhere else in the world. Birds rule its skies and it’s stunning landscapes are the stage for a miracle migration of millions.

programme.title: E3 - Macro Mozambique
programme.desc: The coast of Mozambique is home to giants, like humpbacks and whale sharks, but the tiniest species play just as big of a role in the ecosystem. Meet the scientists who are working against the clock to protect coastal creatures big and small.

programme.title: E1 - Island of the White Shark
programme.desc: Off Guadalupe Island, Mexico, top shark ecologist Mauricio Hoyos attempts a television first. Get a unique view as he attaches a camera to the dorsal fin of a great white, revealing how it swims, hunts, and ultimately strikes its prey.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band - to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: E4 - Flight Path
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.desc: Go on a junk-food-fuelled urban holiday with the Street Troop, then watch the Hill Troop’s invasion of their turf turn sour. Monitor the Sisterhood’s plot to kidnap Sara’s baby before newly minted alpha Loci discovers his old rival is back in town.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: Two brothers take a vow of silence in a bid to make their parents buy a TV, which launches a debate about the nature of communication in Ozu's smart comedy.

programme.desc: A donkey embarks on a difficult journey to survive a cruel, brutal world.

programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time. // Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: Set in a palliative care ward with patients of limited life expectancy or those struggling with daily life, nurse Henmi Ayumi (Kishii Yukino) and part-time doctor Hirono Seiji (Matsuyama Kenichi) engage with patients and their families' complex situations, striving to alleviate pain and enrich their limited time to the fullest until their final moments. The story, through the characters' struggles and emotions, questions the meaning of living and facing death, illuminating hope for our future.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Oikawa Shimon, a chef who has lost everything, drifts into Tsukihate, an imaginary town where those on the brink of life mysteriously gather. There he finds Magdala-ya, a tiny diner on a cliff run by Ria Arima-a mysterious woman with a scar on the neck. Through Ria's cooking and her unconditional kindness, Shimon begins to reclaim the courage to live. Based on Harada Maha's novel, this moving drama explores sin, redemption, and the irreplaceable value of life.

programme.title: Once upon a time in Triad Society
programme.desc: As the triad boss Lek-kuen is dying after being shot, he remembers how he became a triad member. Under the influence of Brethen Sheung-yee, Lek-kuen joined the triad society. Yet, Lek-kuen is so kind in nature that his superior and colleagues always betray him. He escapes to Japan but is still attacked by enemies, embroiling his wife Wooden Cart Noodle being killed. Afterwards, Lek-kuen becomes the worst guy among the triad members. At this moment, the story returns to the space-time when Lek-kuen is dying. In fact, he trumps up the mentioned story. The truth is that Lek-kuen does all kinds of evil but he survives from assassination. During the tussle between the Japanese triads and Hong Kong police, Lek-kuen is saved by a mysterious lady. Nevertheless, he is finally shot dead though nobody knows who the murderer is...

programme.title: Purple Storm
programme.desc: On the eve of the inauguration of Hong Kong's new airport, a Korean cargo ship is found floating in the seas off Hong Kong, its crew murdered. The only survivor is Todd Nguyen, who is found unconscious on the vessel. When he awakes from his coma, he suffers from total amnesia. When it's discovered that Todd is a member of a Cambodian terrorist unit, an expert criminal psychiatrist convinces him that he is in fact an undercover agent sent to infiltrate the Cambodian organization...

programme.title: Midnight Fly
programme.desc: Michele takes off for Europe to contemplate her inevitable divorce. She meets the beautiful Miki, a Japanese model who tries to end a relationship with a married man. There is nothing like love trouble to foster a quick bond and the women become close friends. However, during an evening of drunken revelry, Miki discloses by accident that she is the other woman of Michele's husband...

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Pattaya, heavy rain pours down relentlessly. But the Dokbakz don't care. Rain or shine, they go all in. They head to a buggy car experience centre, where they can roam through nature.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Today's Mystery Box comes with a twist - our judges present secret ingredients our cooks must use in their dish. The problem is, they won't know what the ingredients are until 30 minutes into their cook.

programme.title: E6 - Cajun Steak Diane With Foie Gras Dirty Rice
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a soulful Southern twist on steak Diane, a pan-fried beef steak, by adding Cajun spices to the marinade and serving it with foie gras and Creole dirty rice.

programme.title: A Pickleball Christmas
programme.desc: After winning the biggest match of his career, professional tennis phenom Luke Hollis is ready to hang up his racket and take over family's tennis club.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Today's Mystery Box comes with a twist - our judges present secret ingredients our cooks must use in their dish. The problem is, they won't know what the ingredients are until 30 minutes into their cook.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Pattaya, heavy rain pours down relentlessly. But the Dokbakz don't care. Rain or shine, they go all in. They head to a buggy car experience centre, where they can roam through nature.

programme.title: E3 - Zac Efron
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls leads Zac Efron (Neighbors (2014)) on a non-stop extreme survival journey into the Northeast Appalachian mountain range wilderness. programme.title: How Europe Is Replacing China And The US
programme.desc: After decades of stalled talks, Europe has reached a trade turning point: It's been on a deal signing spree, inking mammoth pacts with major powers like India, Indonesia, Australia, Brazil and Argentina. This is a story about how the world recalibrates when the US goes rogue, and the race to rely less on China.

programme.title: The Secret To Concentration - How To Increase Your Attention Span
programme.desc: Constant stimuli, digital distractions - how can we stay focused these days? Does talent, training, or technology help? Neuroscientists and mental coaches show how concentration works in the brain.

programme.title: Considering A Solo Trip? Eva Zu Beck And DW Reporters Share Their Experienc
programme.desc: Solo travel is on the rise - but what does it really take to explore the world on your own, especially as a woman? In this episode, global explorer Eva zu Beck and DW Travel hosts share their personal insights and experiences from years of solo travel. Be sure to watch until the end, when Eva zu Beck, Hanna Hummel, Sarah Hucal, Aisha Sharipzhan and Goenna Ketels reveal their most helpful tips.

programme.title: The Business Case For Space - And Which Country Will Get There First?
programme.desc: The world spent E106 billion on space in 2023 - more than the GDP of most countries. Critics call it a vanity project. Supporters point to trillion-dollar spinoffs like GPS and satellite navigation that quietly power everything from Uber to global banking. So, who's right? We dig into the numbers and challenge the hype around lunar mining.

programme.title: Can't Walk But I Can Fly
programme.desc: 23-year-old Luisa Rizzo feels most at home when piloting a drone - either as a cinematographer, or as one of the foremost pilots in the fast-growing sport of drone racing. Being born with spinal muscular atrophy means Luisa spends much of her time in a wheelchair, and racing has given her a sense of freedom and purpose. Can she continue her sporting success at the highly competitive World Cup?

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E1 - An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi & his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts & how ducks float. Blippi & FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E1 - Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko is using his genius for some amazing outdoor fixes! On a rainy camping trip, Green Mechanical runs out of battery, so Gecko & Grandma create a water wheel from scratch to recharge her with green energy! Then, when Mr. Weasel's advertising blimp starts to fly away with him attached, Gecko must use a bouncy castle to prepare a soft landing! From finding lost keys in a sandcastle to stopping Max from getting stuck in the mud, Gecko can fix it all!

programme.title: E6 - Twinkle's Calming Sounds
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Learn & Dance with JJ's Animal Pals!
programme.desc: It's a learning dance party with JJ's animal pals! First, learn all about vowels with the fun & silly song 'Apples & Bananas.' Then, get ready to count as you dance with dinosaurs & countdown from five to one. The learning continues as you guess what sounds different animals make & bounce like rabbits, frogs & kangaroos on a trampoline! Plus, you can even learn to sing 'Itsy Bitsy Spider' entirely in Spanish with Nina!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E3 - A Day with JJ: Morning & Night!
programme.desc: Spend a whole day with JJ, from morning to night! Wake up & get ready with the family as JJ learns his morning routine. Then, it's off to a big adventure: JJ's first day of preschool! He's a little nervous, but he makes new friends & has lots of fun. After a full day of playing, it's time to get ready for bed. Mommy guides JJ through his nighttime routine of brushing his teeth, taking a bath & reading a story before he drifts off to sleep.

programme.title: E1 - An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi & his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts & how ducks float. Blippi & FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: E6 - Baby John Meets Our Local Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John is meeting our amazing local heroes! He discovers the important role of a police officer in the community & learns that they are here to help keep everyone safe. Then, he gets inspired by firefighters & forms his very own rescue team! The heroic day continues as the kids learn about all different kinds of jobs on career day at preschool & Baby John decides to take on a new challenge: becoming an ambulance driver!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Sing with All the Animals
programme.desc: It's time to sing, play & learn with all of JJ's animal pals! The fun begins as JJ hosts a big talent show in the clubhouse where all his friends get to showcase their unique skills, from magic to circus tricks! Then, everyone joins in for a fun game of 'Follow the Leader,' where JJ learns that a little encouragement goes a long way. Plus, sing along as the friends learn all the different sounds the animals make & help Humpty Dumpty when he keeps falling off a wall!

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E3 - Wael Sawan On Leading Shell: Control What You Can Amid Global Uncertainty
programme.desc: Shell CEO Wael Sawan reflects on navigating volatility in the global energy system, emphasizing disciplined decision-making and focusing on what leaders can influence.

programme.title: E4 - Conquering The Miracle Of Life

programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E208 - Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E303 - Pedro's Cough
programme.desc: Pedro gets a contagious cough at daycare and other children soon catch it. When it's time to go the grown-ups catch it too, including Madame Gazelle. Doctor Brown Bear gives them terrible-tasting medicine, but who will look after him when he is sick?

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E907 - The Dragon Game
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are magically transported into an enchanted board game called The Dragon Game! Now, the four friends must overcome the game's dragon-themed challenges to win!

programme.title: E742 - When I Grow Up
programme.desc: It's time for playgroup and today Peppa and friends are deciding what they might like to be when they grow up.

programme.title: E217 - The Crew Celebrates Builder Covegiving Day / The Crew Builds A Rocket Ship
programme.desc: After Speed Meister sabotages Builder Covegiving Day, it's up to the pups to save the holiday for everyone in Builder Cove. // Mix dreams about giving the moon a Mix makeover. Rubble and the pups make her dream a reality with a new boardwalk ride!

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E907 - The Dragon Game
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are magically transported into an enchanted board game called The Dragon Game! Now, the four friends must overcome the game's dragon-themed challenges to win!

programme.title: E412 - Snow Day Showdown
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Axle City, and every truck in town is lining up for a delicious winter warm-up: hot chocolate! But when Crusher tries to take all the hot chocolate for himself, Blaze is in hot pursuit to get it back!

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E407 - The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: E112 - The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: E208 - Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E112 - The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E412 - Snow Day Showdown
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Axle City, and every truck in town is lining up for a delicious winter warm-up: hot chocolate! But when Crusher tries to take all the hot chocolate for himself, Blaze is in hot pursuit to get it back!

programme.title: Eels v Titans
programme.desc: Coverage of the 2026 NRL season featuring the brightest stars in Rugby League universe.

programme.title: Hurricanes v Blues
programme.desc: Live coverage of the 2026 Super Rugby Championship featuring teams from across the southern hemisphere.

programme.title: 2011 - Italy v France
programme.desc: A look at some of the best matches in the history of rugby's Six Nations.

programme.title: James Hardie Pro-Football Hall of Fame Invitational
James Hardie Pro-Football Hall of Fame Invitational
105th New Zealand Open presented by Millbrook Resort
James Hardie Pro-Football Hall of Fame Invitational
105th New Zealand Open presented by Millbrook Resort
Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Ice Cream Stick
programme.desc: Ice cream isn't just fun for eating. Hepi and Briko come up with some sizzling ideas.

programme.title: Trip to Bulgaria
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are crafting when Alim arrives with a cold, unable to speak. Zoe suggests using head nods, but Alim's nods confuse them. To explain, he takes them to Bulgaria, where Iliana shows them how Bulgarian nods differ, leading Zoe and Milo into an adventure.

programme.title: Ebb's New Toy
programme.desc: Ma gives Flo a new teddy bear but Ebb likes her old bear best. Ebb secretly rescues Old Ted and Flo and Bird discover his secret. Now Flo has her new bear and Ebb sleeps with Old Ted and Bird in their life belt bed at night. Things Couldn't Be...

programme.title: Spring into Action
programme.desc: Inspired by a sleepover at a friend's place, Darwin and Newts build a trampoline prototype before building a larger trampoline.

programme.title: You're Mostly Made of Water!
programme.desc: Did you know you're mostly made of water? Find out how as the doctors say hello to your hypothalamus - the amazing part of your brain that keeps you hydrated.

programme.title: Big Top Doki
programme.desc: Doki is sure giants don't exist until they're invited to come and be giants, at a giants' festival. But how can we be giants? They set off to Douai, France to find out! On arrival, they literally run into two giants.

programme.title: Giang Brothers: Renowned Circus Performers
programme.desc: The Giang brothers demonstrate how they used their incredible circus skills to achieve a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest blindfolded ascent and descent of an elevated platform while balancing on each other's head.

programme.title: Space Rescues
programme.desc: Sending humans into space is always risky. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at a couple close calls on missions that have had to abort after launch, and examines steps being taken by NASA to prepare for the worst.

programme.title: You're Mostly Made of Water!
programme.desc: Did you know you're mostly made of water? Find out how as the doctors say hello to your hypothalamus - the amazing part of your brain that keeps you hydrated.

programme.title: Trip to Bulgaria
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are crafting when Alim arrives with a cold, unable to speak. Zoe suggests using head nods, but Alim's nods confuse them. To explain, he takes them to Bulgaria, where Iliana shows them how Bulgarian nods differ, leading Zoe and Milo into an adventure.

programme.title: Spring into Action
programme.desc: Inspired by a sleepover at a friend's place, Darwin and Newts build a trampoline prototype before building a larger trampoline.

programme.title: Ice Cream Stick
programme.desc: Ice cream isn't just fun for eating. Hepi and Briko come up with some sizzling ideas.

programme.title: Vik on Ice
programme.desc: When Vik's attempts at ice skating aren't successful right away, he learns to keep trying, even if at first you don't succeed.

programme.title: Communicating without Wires
programme.desc: How come we can't hear people talking next to us when we're in the sea? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of sound. Have hands-on fun by making a basic phone, and get to know Guglielmo Marconi, a physicist and inventor – ‘the father of radio'.

programme.title: Reduce Water
programme.desc: After a boat game, the Grimwade family is concerned about how much water and electricity they use. But which of the 5 R's can help them make a difference, and how will Daddy wash his car?

programme.title: Periscope
programme.desc: Look round a corner or over a wall, with this clever device you can see like you're tall!

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: Pick Me
programme.desc: Pick Me, the Labrador, has a yucky wart removed from his eye, and Jimmy, the horse, has his giant gnashers cleaned. And a one-eyed owl and a cute orphaned fox cub get the Junior Vet treatment.

programme.title: Roger Has A Problem
programme.desc: In today's episode, Roger, the dog, has eaten a tennis ball. Will he feel bouncier after an operation to remove it? Also, a pony has a hurt hoof, and there is a pig who thinks he's a dog! And Johnny and Inel find out how to help a constipated guinea pig.

programme.title: Periscope
programme.desc: Look round a corner or over a wall, with this clever device you can see like you're tall!

programme.title: You're Mostly Made of Water!
programme.desc: Did you know you're mostly made of water? Find out how as the doctors say hello to your hypothalamus - the amazing part of your brain that keeps you hydrated.

programme.title: Big Top Doki
programme.desc: Doki is sure giants don't exist until they're invited to come and be giants, at a giants' festival. But how can we be giants? They set off to Douai, France to find out! On arrival, they literally run into two giants.

programme.title: I Love Hong Kong
programme.desc: Ng Shun returns with his wife Shun-Soh and three children to celebrate Ng Kin's 60th birthday. Unknown to Kin, his son has gotten into trouble and is plotting for him to take the rap. At the same time, Long, a swindler who conned money from the neighbours 30 years ago is now a property tycoon. He promises to pay each of the 30 neighbours HK$100 million as compensation as long as a representative of each household returns to the estate on Lunar New Year's Eve. A mad rush ensues as Shun and his family tries to gather the old neighbours to avoiding missing the bonanza.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E10 - 蔡國慶時尚品味揭秘惹全場沸騰
programme.desc: 腦洞鑑定類綜藝推理脫口秀，陣容為薛之謙、大張偉、楊迪、劉維、黃子弘凡、黃聖依、龐博等…節目圍繞著當下熱梗熱點、觀眾的興趣點、共鳴點展開故事；火星特工廣發英雄帖正面對撞，迎戰近年最出圈、最有趣、最敢說的廠牌大咖們，真金不怕火煉，一場席卷全網的廠牌巔峰之戰即將展開！

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 「青春守藝人」系列微紀錄片，穿越千年文脈，跋涉千山萬水，記錄傳統非遺的煥新故事，聆聽青春傳承的時代之音。一期一會，影像留住記憶，涵養精神文脈、厚植文化自信，向世界呈現絢爛多彩、賡續綿延的中華文明。

programme.title: E12 - 徐夢潔古裝首次亮相
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。
